title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Public Safety and Homeland Security to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate documents relative to wakesurfing.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, June 18, 2026 -- The committee on Public Safety and Homeland Security, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3099) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Ryan C. Fattman for legislation to implement fines on motorboat operators engaged in wakesurfing activity in close proximity to the shoreline, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 3126).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Public Safety and Homeland Security
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
